results.name: type addition book
results.description: The release of Secrets of Strixhaven introduced the Book subtype, with errata to previous artifacts.

results.name: type addition from none
results.description: Some creatures (Commonly artifact creatures) prior to the Grand Creature Type update were printed without Creature Types.

results.name: type addition human
results.description:
Creatures that weren't previously a human and just identified by their job, despite being a human, and then gained that type.

Creatures that had a strange type line from before standardisation, then jumped straight to being human aren't counted in this

results.name: type addition noble
results.description: Gained the Noble type, either after it was reintroduced with the big sweep at Eldraine launch, or at a later date.

results.name: type addition phyrexian
results.description: Gained the Phyrexian type, either after it was introduced with the big sweep at Modern Horizons 2 launch, or at a later date.

results.name: type addition sorcerer
results.description: These creatures gained the Sorcerer type with the release of Lorwyn Eclipsed

results.name: type errata
results.description: Cards that were printed with a type-line that has since been updated. For cards whose token generation has changed, see [Token Errata](token-errata).

results.name: type errata addition
results.description: Cards that received a new type because it fit them, or because they were lacking one before.

results.name: type errata cephalid
results.description: These were Cephalids, now Octopuses as of Modern Horizons 3.

results.name: type errata dinosaur
results.description: These creatures that were obviously dinosaurs the whole time, gained or changed to a Dinosaur typeline with the release of Ixalan.

results.name: type errata egg
results.description: These cards gained (Or re-gained in some cases) the egg type when it was reintroduced in Core set 2019

results.name: type errata genericise
results.description:
Sets of cards that were moved away from their creature type name to a more generic one, to allow them to work in typal decks better.

Cephalids, Naga and Viashino live in our hearts forever.

results.name: type errata hound
results.description: These were all hounds, now thanks to Ruff they're all dogs, as of Core set 2021 (Or in the case of Jackal Pup, a Jackal)

results.name: type errata lord
results.description: These cards used to have the now defunct "Lord" type

results.name: type errata mammoth
results.description: Mammoths are just elephants anyway.

results.name: type errata naga
results.description: These were Naga, now Snakes as of Modern Horizons 3.

results.name: type errata name self
results.description: These creatures used to just have Summon {CARDNAME} in their text box. Cf. [eponymous](eponymous).

results.name: type errata shark
results.description: These cards weren't sharks, but became sharks when IKO was released.

results.name: type errata specific
results.description: Cards that had a very specific type line that was simplified to a larger group.

results.name: type errata specific horse
results.description: These were a specific type of horse (Or carriage) and are now just plain old horses.

results.name: type errata summon creature
results.description: These creatures typelines at some point just read "Summon Creature", thanks to Portal!

results.name: type errata viashino
results.description: These were Viashino, now Lizards as of Modern Horizons 3.

results.name: typeline interrupt
results.description: Printings that were Interrupts

results.name: typeline summon
results.description: Creatures that in their typeline have "Summon X" instead of the modern Creature — X

results.name: type removal cat rakshasa
results.description: Rakshasa used to be Cat Demons or Cat Devils, but they have now lost the Cat type

results.name: typo
results.description: Printings that contain a typographical error.

results.name: tyrite
results.description: A material from Kaldheim's world tree that resembles an aurora given solid form.

results.name: tyro
results.description: Haru's dad, imprisoned by the Fire Nation.
